rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target implementation when binding implementation-level constraints to visible features.
generic_rules: Preserve the AADL component hierarchy when embedding annexes; do not alter outer structure.
Bind contract logic only to features or properties explicitly visible in the target scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` for contract blocks in implementation contexts.
Comparison expressions must evaluate to bool using valid numeric types and operators.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new components, ports, or properties to satisfy contract logic.
